"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.unreleasedLabels = exports.browserNameMap = void 0; const unreleasedLabels = exports.unreleasedLabels = { safari: "tp" }; const browserNameMap = exports.browserNameMap = { and_chr: "chrome", and_ff: "firefox", android: "android", chrome: "chrome", edge: "edge", firefox: "firefox", ie: "ie", ie_mob: "ie", ios_saf: "ios", node: "node", deno: "deno", op_mob: "opera_mobile", opera: "opera", safari: "safari", samsung: "samsung" }; //# sourceMappingURL=targets.js.map
